race.comment: CROWS (4) opened this prep with a win two runs ago. Not as effective last time out when ninth over 1400m at Port Hedland. Looks well placed so expect a better run this time. LEADING TADDY (2) settled well back and turned in a sub-par run last time out over 1200m at Port Hedland after a nice win the start prior. Suitably placed so anticipating a big run this time. PERCUSSION PRINCE (6) was in the placings when just under two lengths back from the winner last start at Port Hedland and is down in weight this time. Rosie Mahony stays aboard. Has winning claims on best figures. IMMORTAL SHIELD (10) gave away a considerable start over 1400m at Port Hedland last time before hitting the line well to finish fourth. Should prove tough to hold out. CHEDDAR BOB (3) returned with a bang here last time out and can repeat the dose.
